methods.method_name: gentle scraping with a sterile blade and needle
soaked with sterile distilled water for 12-24 h
transferred to BG – ll medium with or without combined nitrogen
incubated at 28 ± 1°C under continuous light for up to 15 days
photomicrographs taken using a Meiji trinocular research microscope fitted with a Nikon Coolpix 4500 digital camera
